test_name: Permutation null for Enmenanak score (random rendering tokens)
verdict: P30-A1 permutation null on Enmenanak[1]PN: observed score 7.0 sits at the 99.48 percentile of 10000 random-rendering permutations. Empirical p-value (one-sided, P(null >= observed)) = 0.0053. Null distribution: mean=3.6155, p95=5.5, p99=6.0.
